PostToolUse.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?|css)$'; then npx eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern "$file" 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'interactive-headshot' | grep -v '0 problems' | head -5 || true; fi
file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.tsx?$'; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E '^[^ ].*error TS' | head -5 || true; fi

PreToolUse.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; if echo "$file" | grep -q 'layout.tsx'; then echo '⚠️  Editing layout.tsx — if you change the inline dark-mode script, update the CSP SHA-256 hash in netlify.toml'; fi; if echo "$file" | grep -q 'netlify.toml'; then echo '⚠️  Editing netlify.toml — ensure CSP hash still matches the inline script in layout.tsx'; fi
